title: Mantis Cart
features: Aluminum fenders to protect load from rubbing tires
4 - 10'' no-flat tires with ball bearing hubs
All welded steel tube frame, powdercoated
62.5″ Height – From floor to top handle
27″ Width – From outside wheel to outside wheel
50″ Length – From end of fork to edge of rear wheel.
Center of forks are spaced 14-3/4″ apart

specifications.Cart Type: Chiavari Chair Cart, Multipurpose, Stacking Chair Cart
